manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Literature
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Twenty years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: From July 15

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: RECRUITER: How long have you been working in your area in the industry?
ANSWER: I have been working in this industry for twenty years.
RECRUITER: When can you start?
ANSWER: I am available to start from July 15.
RECRUITER: What did you study in your bachelor?
ANSWER: I studied Literature for my bachelor's degree.
RECRUITER: What academic level have you achieved?
ANSWER: I have achieved a PhD.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Has the recruiter been informed about the field of your bachelor? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Literature
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Twenty years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Dancing
AVAILABILITY: From July 15

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

ANSWER: I have been working in this industry for twenty years.
RECRUITER: When can you start?
